headline: PE's in full momentum heading into spring 2026—here's what's actually moving the needle

stories.title: AI Skills Are Now Table Stakes for PE Analysts
stories.summary: PE firms are shifting hiring away from traditional analyst roles toward candidates with data-centric and coding skills. 84% of PE funds expect AI to transform their business, and over half are already hunting for data scientists and digital transformation specialists.
stories.takeaway: If you're in consulting considering PE, start building technical chops NOW—coding, data analytics, even basic Python skills. The days of pure modeling being enough are lowkey over.

stories.title: Healthcare PE Deals Are About to Explode in 2026
stories.summary: After 2025's cautious pause, healthcare M&A is poised for a rebound driven by better-quality assets, improving market conditions, and mega-funds deploying dry powder. Behavioral health, ambulatory surgery centers, and tech-enabled care are the hot spots.
stories.takeaway: Healthcare's becoming PE's playground in 2026—especially if you can demonstrate AI integration and operational value creation. The IPO window is cracking open again fr.

stories.title: PE Deal Volume Expected to Keep Rising, but Only for Megafunds
stories.summary: 2026 is shaping up to be selective—mega-funds are deploying record dry powder into fewer, larger deals, while mid-market PE faces tougher fundraising. The industry is now mature and demanding sharper operational value creation, not just leverage plays.
stories.takeaway: PE's recovering but it's a K-shaped game. Mega-funds eating well, mid-market grinding harder. Winners will be obsessed with operational excellence and actual EBITDA growth, not multiple expansion tricks.

watchNext.title: Bain & Company's 2026 Global Private Equity Report
watchNext.why: Comprehensive breakdown of PE trends, exit strategies, and the shift toward operational value creation. Essential reading if you want to understand what deal leadership actually cares about rn.

watchNext.title: EY's PE Pulse: 2026 Hiring Trends & Specialist Demand
watchNext.why: Direct intel on what PE firms are hiring for—data scientists, digital transformation leads, AI specialists. Tells you exactly what skills to build if you're planning your next move.
